emails.subject: ECSC - Market Energy Price language
emails.body: ECSC Market Energy Price language Gerald: Attached please find my proposed revisions to the Transaction Agreement for the ECS/EES transaction to address the Market Energy Price calculation. Sorry it took me a little longer than I anticipated. Give me a call if you have any questions. Leslie
